# HELP tidb_executor_statement_total Counter of StmtNode.
# TYPE tidb_executor_statement_total counter
tidb_executor_statement_total{type="Begin"} 0
tidb_executor_statement_total{type="Commit"} 0
tidb_executor_statement_total{type="Delete"} 0
tidb_executor_statement_total{type="Insert"} 0
tidb_executor_statement_total{type="Replace"} 0
tidb_executor_statement_total{type="Rollback"} 0
tidb_executor_statement_total{type="Select"} 3
tidb_executor_statement_total{type="Show"} 0
tidb_executor_statement_total{type="Update"} 0
tidb_executor_statement_total{type="Use"} 0
# HELP tidb_server_handle_query_duration_seconds Bucketed histogram of processing time (s) of handled queries.
# TYPE tidb_server_handle_query_duration_seconds histogram
tidb_server_handle_query_duration_seconds_bucket{sql_type="Begin",le="0.0005"} 0
tidb_server_handle_query_duration_seconds_bucket{sql_type="Begin",le="0.001"} 0
tidb_server_handle_query_duration_seconds_bucket{sql_type="Begin",le="0.002"} 0
tidb_server_handle_query_duration_seconds_bucket{sql_type="Begin",le="0.004"} 0

# TYPE tidb_server_connections gauge
tidb_server_connections 1

# TYPE process_cpu_seconds_total counter
process_cpu_seconds_total 7.01

# TYPE tidb_server_execute_error_total counter

# TYPE process_resident_memory_bytes gauge
process_resident_memory_bytes 9.3704192e+07

# TYPE tidb_server_query_total counter

# TYPE tidb_server_disconnection_total counter
